note: Unlike Banking Basics' reserve list, these terms are NOT excluded from content/money-basics-terms.json — they remain full, active educational vocabulary (definitions unchanged, stable IDs unchanged). This file only records their puzzle-eligibility classification: neither may be assigned to a live word-wheel puzzle, as a one-word puzzle or otherwise, until a governance decision under 'Required governance decision' below is made and a valid cluster becomes possible.

terms.reason: Requires all nine wheel tiles alone (repeated I and N). No other approved Money Basics term can be added without exceeding the wheel budget — zero compatible partners exist.

Uses eight of nine wheel tiles alone, leaving no room for any approved partner term — checked against all 35 other approved Money Basics terms, zero fit within the remaining one-tile budget. Its only prior grouping (with CASH and PAY) was additionally invalid on separate grounds: PAY is a literal prefix of PAYCHECK, which the shared word-game engine auto-submits before PAYCHECK's remaining letters can be selected, making that grouping structurally unsolvable regardless of wheel budget.

requiredGovernanceDecision: Approve additional compatible Money Basics vocabulary that could partner with either term.
Approve an expanded wheel budget for these two puzzles specifically.
Approve a specifically governed one-answer tutorial or long-word puzzle mode.

(PAYCHECK only) Approve a shared word-game engine change so a prefix match no longer auto-submits when a longer valid word in the same puzzle could still be completed — a cross-world engine change affecting Credit, Crypto, and Banking Basics too, not scoped to this decision.
